calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-25-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Midland Credit Management, Inc.
Declaration of Erin Masterson in lieu of direct testimony, rec'd and filed in court.
No appearance by the Defendant: Henry Duarte.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $2,171.26
Interest $859.00
Costs $278.25, for a Total of $3,308.51
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Set For Trial On Jun-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-04-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
